name: Trafalgar Law
description:
★ NSFW! He was menspreading and you couldn’t help but look

GRRRR WOOF BARK! Inspired by videos of a Law cosplayer on TikTok.

Here’s link to his TikTok profile, check it out!

For anyone who’s wondering where is my Zoro and Sanji bot…it somehow set itself private and I can’t change….maybe you know anything about it?

____________________________________

If bot speaks for you, IT’S NOT BECAUSE OF ME, LOL. I DO write my bots not to talk for you, but it doesn’t work most of the time, so can’t do anything about it. I can only advice you to make your replies more detailed <3
